'''wongapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twatty|twatty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twatty|twatty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wongapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wongapithi|wongapithi]] || [[word:wongapiji|wongapiji]] || [[word:wongapishi|wongapishi]] || [[word:wongapiki|wongapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wongaputhuthu|wongaputhuthu]] || [[word:wongapujuju|wongapujuju]] || [[word:wongapushushu|wongapushushu]] || [[word:wongapukuku|wongapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wongaputhu|wongaputhu]] || [[word:wongapuju|wongapuju]] || [[word:wongapushu|wongapushu]] || [[word:wongapuku|wongapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wongapufthuf|wongapufthuf]] || [[word:wongapufjuf|wongapufjuf]] || [[word:wongapufshuf|wongapufshuf]] || [[word:wongapufkuf|wongapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wongapethe|wongapethe]] || [[word:wongapeje|wongapeje]] || [[word:wongapeshe|wongapeshe]] || [[word:wongapeke|wongapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wongapothotho|wongapothotho]] || [[word:wongapojojo|wongapojojo]] || [[word:wongaposhosho|wongaposhosho]] || [[word:wongapokoko|wongapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wongapotho|wongapotho]] || [[word:wongapojo|wongapojo]] || [[word:wongaposho|wongaposho]] || [[word:wongapoko|wongapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wongapofthof|wongapofthof]] || [[word:wongapofjof|wongapofjof]] || [[word:wongapofshof|wongapofshof]] || [[word:wongapofkof|wongapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wongapïfthïf|wongapïfthïf]] || [[word:wongapïfjïf|wongapïfjïf]] || [[word:wongapïfshïf|wongapïfshïf]] || [[word:wongapïfkïf|wongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wongapïfthïfthïf|wongapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:wongapïfjïfjïf|wongapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:wongapïfshïfshïf|wongapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:wongapïfkïfkïf|wongapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wongapïfthïf|wongapïfthïf]] || [[word:wongapïfjïf|wongapïfjïf]] || [[word:wongapïfshïf|wongapïfshïf]] || [[word:wongapïfkïf|wongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wongapïfthïf|wongapïfthïf]] || [[word:wongapïfjïf|wongapïfjïf]] || [[word:wongapïfshïf|wongapïfshïf]] || [[word:wongapïfkïf|wongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wongapæthæ|wongapæthæ]] || [[word:wongapæjæ|wongapæjæ]] || [[word:wongapæshæ|wongapæshæ]] || [[word:wongapækæ|wongapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wongapathatha|wongapathatha]] || [[word:wongapajaja|wongapajaja]] || [[word:wongapashasha|wongapashasha]] || [[word:wongapakaka|wongapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wongapatha|wongapatha]] || [[word:wongapaja|wongapaja]] || [[word:wongapasha|wongapasha]] || [[word:wongapaka|wongapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wongapafthaf|wongapafthaf]] || [[word:wongapafjaf|wongapafjaf]] || [[word:wongapafshaf|wongapafshaf]] || [[word:wongapafkaf|wongapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wongapasha|wongapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wongapshësha|wongapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wongaprosha|wongaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wongapmusha|wongapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wongapyasha|wongapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowongapnkshësha|gowongapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowongapnkrosha|gowongapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowongapnkmusha|gowongapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowongapnkyasha|gowongapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wongangapasha|wongangapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wongangapshësha|wongangapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wongangaprosha|wongangaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wongangapmusha|wongangapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wongangapyasha|wongangapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowongangapnkshësha|gowongangapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowongangapnkrosha|gowongangapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowongangapnkmusha|gowongangapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowongangapnkyasha|gowongangapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wengæpasha|wengæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wengæpshësha|wengæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wengæprosha|wengæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wengæpmusha|wengæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wengæpyasha|wengæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowengæpnkshësha|gowengæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowengæpnkrosha|gowengæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowengæpnkmusha|gowengæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowengæpnkyasha|gowengæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wongfapasha|wongfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wongfapshësha|wongfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wongfaprosha|wongfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wongfapmusha|wongfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wongfapyasha|wongfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowongfapnkshësha|gowongfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowongfapnkrosha|gowongfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowongfapnkmusha|gowongfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowongfapnkyasha|gowongfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
